articles.title: Israel Using Ethereum for CBDC Pilot Instead of Ripple’s Private Version of XRP Ledger
articles.description: The Bank of Israel is reportedly using Ethereum’s technology to trial a digital version of its fiat currency, the shekel. The central bank is using Ethereum instead of Ripple’s private version of the XRP ledger. According to Bloomberg, in May the central bank issued a report that concluded a digital shekel payment system could have […]
